data.description:
## Incident Overview
ticket-platform-matrix CI job fails consistently on alpine-busybox matrix leg. git -C $SCRIPT_DIR rev-parse --show-toplevel returns 'fatal: not a git repository' in the Alpine container because of git safe.directory ownership mismatch. REPO_ROOT is set to empty string, causing source paths like /tests/lib/assert.sh (missing repo root prefix), making assert_eq and clone_ticket_repo undefined.

## Steps to Reproduce
Push any commit that touches ticket-lib-api.sh or tests/scripts/test-ticket-*.sh. ticket-platform-matrix workflow triggers; alpine-busybox leg fails at 'Run platform compat tests' step.

## Error Output
fatal: not a git repository (or any parent up to mount point /)
tests/scripts/test-ticket-platform-compat.sh: line 25: /tests/lib/assert.sh: No such file or directory
assert_eq: command not found
clone_ticket_repo: command not found
Process completed with exit code 127.
data.title: [ticket-platform-matrix]: git rev-parse fails in Alpine container -> assert.sh not sourced, all tests fail with command not found
